commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6fe6f0ff6ee79352121b417ebb779da2fee34f49)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a backup startup sweep that removes stale `openclaw-backup-*` staging directories under the selected temp root and stale `<output basename>.<uuid>.tmp` archives next to the output path, with unit coverage.

PR surface: Source +69, Tests +83. Total +152 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main creates the reported temp archive and staging directory and removes both only in an in-process `finally`, but I did not run a destructive hard-kill reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer review of the active-writer cleanup guard before it can merge; the unmet proof gate makes this unsuitable for automated repair routing.

target.title: fix(backup): sweep stale temp artifacts before creating new backup
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where interrupted `backup create` runs can leave stale backup staging directories and full-size temporary archive files behind. A hard kill, OOM, host reboot, or process restart skips the in-process cleanup block, so these artifacts can accumulate and consume disk space across later backup runs.

Fixes #95582

## Why This Change Was Made

The backup startup path now sweeps only OpenClaw-owned stale backup artifacts older than one hour before creating a new archive. The sweep is scoped to the selected backup staging temp root for `openclaw-backup-*` directories and to the requested output path's sibling temp files matching `<output basename>.<uuid>.tmp`, avoiding broad deletion of unrelated shared-temp files.

## User Impact

Users and operators can rerun `backup create` after a killed or interrupted backup and have old OpenClaw backup temp artifacts cleaned automatically before the new backup starts. Recent artifacts remain protected by the one-hour grace window so active concurrent runs are not removed.

## Evidence

- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm exec vitest run -c test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/backup-create.test.ts -t "sweepStaleBackupArtifacts"` -> 4 passed, 38 skipped
- `git diff --check` -> passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/backup-create.test.ts` -> 28 passed, then 14 existing `createBackupArchive` tests failed on Windows with `EBUSY` unlinking temp SQLite files during test cleanup
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/backup.atomic.test.ts src/commands/backup.test.ts` -> `backup.atomic.test.ts` passed; `backup.test.ts` had 13 passed and 1 Windows `EBUSY` cleanup failure on a temp SQLite WAL file
